note: LODESTAR clean-room starter seed. Hand-authored from community common knowledge — NOT copied from any mining tool's dataset. Coordinates are approximate public galactic reference (coordsApproximate: true) and are authoritatively refined by EDSM enrichment (Step 4.7) and by the commander's own scans (Step 4.3). Intentionally minimal: the database grows primarily from first-party SAASignalsFound scans and, later, opt-in community sync. See resources/seed/PROVENANCE.md.

rings.name: Hyades Sector DB-X d1-112 A 1 A Ring
rings.provenance: Community common knowledge — a long-published Painite laser-mining destination widely referenced on player forums, wikis, and streams since the Painite era. Ring/commodity identity hand-authored, not copied from any tool. Coordinates approximate, EDSM-refined (Step 4.7).

Ring/commodity identity hand-authored, not copied from any tool. Coordinates approximate, EDSM-refined (Step 4.7).
